hipcc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libplugin_stdout.so -o ../../lib/libplugin_stdout.so CMakeFiles/plugin_stdout.dir/stdout/hip_domain/hip_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/plugin_stdout.dir/stdout/hsa_domain/hsa_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/plugin_stdout.dir/stdout/omp_tgt_domain/omp_tgt_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/plugin_stdout.dir/stdout/omp_tgt_rtl_domain/omp_tgt_rtl_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/plugin_stdout.dir/activity_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/plugin_stdout.dir/plugin.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lneto/RATELProf/ratelprof/build/lib ../../lib/libratelprof_core.so
